textByHash.14ef67cd267fe661fa5bfe2c40b4983fa4ebafc5: Sorry, but your mother and I...
textByHash.07b0c9afe2e8624a32eb58f4bcb201ffc8f298a6: tried so hard to find you!
textByHash.d28e64f675a87facc5a37d33d08c59a760a47d84: Please! You must help my son! He's beyond sense.
textByHash.36ebe8d3bc6d5e13f8347880e7b663b8864cc29c: I take it you have travelled through the mental dilemmas of my son, as I have.
textByHash.bd9ff53e7d1623d3e4876109140a79ebeab905b5: Now you must do what I cannot, conquer the physical dilemma!
textByHash.a82c977327aa6c6d8f4f9d3ec7f86ad0d53bd239: Please talk to him, make sure he's OK!
textByHash.82975c26e67d5bf70a10b4a1962f3cfe20fbc017: Don't worry, I'm just glad you're back to yourself. Are you OK?
textByHash.47a821247f4c8165ec3146750356f1157d7528c8: Thank you traveller, I'm glad my wife and I never gave up hope. We should return to her and tell her the good news.
